name: Rhubarb-Cherry Crunch
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. Mix together all of the crust ingredients.
2. Press half of the mixture on the bottom of a 9 X 13-inch pan.
3. Spread the diced rhubarb on top of the crust.
4. In a saucepan, boil sugar, water, and cornstarch until thick.
5. Add almond flavoring, then the cherry pie filling to the saucepan.
6. Spoon the mixture over the rhubarb.
7. Sprinkle the remaining crust mixture over it, then the nuts.
8. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F.
9. Serve warm with whipped cream.
Makes 12 servings.
